_publications._publicationTitle: Medium throughput biochemical compound screening identifies novel agents for pharmacotherapy of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Cantharidin IC50 values for all MPNST cell lines tested were comparable to those obtained in MEF Nf1 −/− E1A-p53
details: Cantharidin IC50 values comparable to those obtained in MEF Nf1−/− E1A-p53
